scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @alisnap/web && npm run lint --workspace @alisnap/api && npm run lint --workspace @alisnap/database
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @alisnap/web && npm run typecheck --workspace @alisnap/api && npm run typecheck --workspace @alisnap/database
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run check:docs && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test
